body:
## ⏳ Usage Limit Reached

The automated solution draft was interrupted because the Claude usage limit was reached.

### 📊 Limit Information
- **Tool**: Claude
- **Limit Type**: Usage limit exceeded
- **Reset Time**: 10:00 PM
- **Session ID**: 4336d412-f155-4cec-ba2b-6a81537b3596

### 🔄 How to Continue
Once the limit resets at **10:00 PM**, you can resume this session by running:
```bash
(cd "/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1768327375795" && claude --resume 4336d412-f155-4cec-ba2b-6a81537b3596 --model opus)
```

📎 **Execution log uploaded as Gist** (3317KB)
🔗 [View complete execution log](https://gist.githubusercontent.com/konard/34d7337bb76fbc4941e62ac2e99103fc/raw/8ef5a275f6c9ec17a05f81496b0e3d8fd7941ed1/solution-draft-log-pr-1768329653218.txt)

*This session was interrupted due to usage limits. You can resume once the limit resets.*
